heading: Omitted
label: 1073 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which exempted distributed funds from Federal and State income taxes and provided for payments to minors and persons under legal disabilities, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–244, § 286 Stat. 57Mar. 9, 1972
